heading: Transferred
label: 60–1 Transferred
notes: CodificationSection 60–1 was editorially reclassified as .section 4101 of this title

Reduction in Number of Employee Positions; Reports, , , as amended by , , ; , , , provided for reduction in number of employee positions on full-time equivalent basis, other than those supported by gift and trust funds, for each entity of legislative branch with more than 100 employee positions, on full-time equivalent basis, as of , by at least 4 percent from level as of such date, provided that such reduction was to be completed not later than , with at least 62.5 percent of reduction for each entity to be achieved by , and defined “entity of legislative branch”.Pub.
